Operation 'byArrivalAirport' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is repetitive and lacks essential details. Enhanced version specifies: (1) what FIDS means in context, (2) what filtering options are available given 18 parameters, (3) what data is returned (status, gates, baggage), (4) supported formats, and (5) authentication requirements. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Retrieve FIDS display data for flights arriving at a given airport
data.current_description: Retrieve FIDS display data for flights arriving at a given airport
data.summary_suggestion: Get arrival flight information display data
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves Flight Information Display System (FIDS) data for all flights arriving at a specified airport. Accepts filtering parameters for time windows, flight status, airlines, and other criteria. Returns a list of arrival flight records with real-time status, gate information, baggage claim details, and other display-relevant data. Supports multiple response formats (JSON, XML). Requires API authentication via appId and appKey.
